name: propose-ai-instructions
description: Reverse of sync-ai-instructions. Scans the current project for stack-specific conventions (v1: Makefile targets for the dotnet stack), classifies each as generic-enough-to-promote vs. project-specific, and writes a reviewable proposal patch for github.com/freaxnx01/ai-instructions. Never commits or pushes upstream — output is a proposal file the user reviews and lands manually.
